structure_flags.label: Background Lemma A
structure_flags.one_line: The §8 lemma has a Role paragraph but lacks the required exact \paragraph{Why this is new and worth studying.} block.

novelty_flags.label: proposal tier floor
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=letter below novelty_target=field; the kernel is a narrow finite-algebra certificate layer over Wang2026 envelope/frontier results plus Winkler1988 moment geometry, so it needs a stronger field-level consequence.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a concrete separation example: two CQTE claims with identical Wang-style pointwise or interval-hull information but different Pi_C/d_C, showing the quotient theorem contains information unavailable from existing envelopes.
Tighten d_C by separating affine dimension, rank with normalization rows, and true free degrees of freedom; include a small worked grid example computing Pi_C and d_C.
Turn the certificate into an algorithmic or inferential payoff, e.g. a complexity bound or auditable breakdown-frontier procedure whose cost is exactly governed by d_C.

recommended_next_step: Revise toward a field-level separation theorem, not just a minimal-description conjecture, and patch the missing §8 why-new block.
